title: Copado User Story Force Promotion
description: Forces a list of User Stories into a Copado Promotion by directly inserting Promoted User Story junction records.

steps.label: 1. Force Stories into Promotion (Anonymous Apex)
steps.note: Replace <PromotionId> with the target Promotion ID and populate <UserStoryId1>, <UserStoryId2>, etc. with the User Story IDs to force in. Run in Anonymous Apex and check debug logs to confirm insertion.
